per_scenario.one_line_critique: Final response is professional and shows great judgment, but the logic is marred by thirteen redundant, identical tool calls.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop of 25 redundant tool calls and failed to answer the follow-up question.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop, repeating the same queries 25 times without ever creating the requested dashboard.
The agent provided the correct answer but executed the same SQL query three times and ended with generic filler text.
